# MikroTik Blocker

> A free, open-source web tool that generates MikroTik RouterOS firewall block scripts by resolving ASNs, BGP prefixes, and CIDR ranges automatically.

## What it does

MikroTik Blocker helps network administrators generate ready-to-paste RouterOS scripts to block specific IP addresses, ASNs, or entire BGP prefix ranges on MikroTik routers. It queries the BGPView API to resolve ASN-to-prefix mappings in real time.

## Use cases

- Block a specific country's IP ranges on MikroTik
- Block an ASN (e.g., a cloud provider or hosting service)
- Generate a firewall address-list script for RouterOS
- Bulk IP blocking without manual CIDR lookup

## Tech stack

- Frontend: React + Vite
- Backend: Node.js API (Vercel serverless)
- Data source: BGPView API for ASN/prefix resolution

## Links

- App: https://mikrotik-blocker.vercel.app
- Source: https://github.com/SamoTech/mikrotik-blocker
